title: Cheat Engine Mastery
description: Complete Cheat Engine workflow for educational game analysis.

topics.title: Exact Value Scans
topics.explanation:
Start with exact scan for known values (health=100, ammo=30). Change value in game, scan again. Repeat until few addresses remain.

Filter by writable, exclude code regions.
learningPath: Read the overview and core concepts for Exact Value Scans
Study official documentation and recommended articles
Complete hands-on exercises in a controlled lab environment
Apply knowledge to a simple open-source game target
Document findings and review prerequisites for advanced topics
exercises: Write a summary explaining Exact Value Scans in your own words
Create a diagram mapping key concepts and relationships
Complete one guided lab exercise related to this topic

topics.title: Unknown Value Scans
topics.description: Finding values when you don't know the exact number.
topics.explanation: Use unknown initial value, then changed/unchanged/increased/decreased after game events. Essential for hidden stats, coordinates, timers.
learningPath: Read the overview and core concepts for Unknown Value Scans
Study official documentation and recommended articles
Complete hands-on exercises in a controlled lab environment
Apply knowledge to a simple open-source game target
Document findings and review prerequisites for advanced topics
exercises: Write a summary explaining Unknown Value Scans in your own words
Create a diagram mapping key concepts and relationships
Complete one guided lab exercise related to this topic

topics.title: Pointer Scanning
topics.explanation: After finding dynamic address, run pointer scan with max level 4-7. Rescan after restart to filter stable paths. Save .PTR files for reuse.
learningPath: Read the overview and core concepts for Pointer Scanning
Study official documentation and recommended articles
Complete hands-on exercises in a controlled lab environment
Apply knowledge to a simple open-source game target
Document findings and review prerequisites for advanced topics
exercises: Write a summary explaining Pointer Scanning in your own words
Create a diagram mapping key concepts and relationships
Complete one guided lab exercise related to this topic

topics.title: Structure Dissect
topics.explanation: Use 'Dissect data/structures' to map fields. Change values in-game and watch offsets change. Group related fields into named structures.
learningPath: Read the overview and core concepts for Structure Dissect

Complete hands-on exercises in a controlled lab environment

Complete one guided lab exercise related to this topic

topics.title: Mono/Unity Features
topics.description: Analyzing Unity Mono games in CE.
topics.explanation:
CE Mono features:
- Dissect mono domain
- Browse classes and fields
- Find instances of class types

For IL2CPP games, use Il2CppDumper + CE together.
learningPath: Read the overview and core concepts for Mono/Unity Features
Study official documentation and recommended articles
Complete hands-on exercises in a controlled lab environment
Apply knowledge to a simple open-source game target

Complete one guided lab exercise related to this topic

topics.title: Lua Scripting in CE
topics.description: Automating scans and analysis with Lua.
topics.explanation:
CE supports Lua for automation:
- Auto-attach and scan
- Timer-based value monitoring
- Custom UI forms

Learn CE Lua API from wiki. Use for repetitive research tasks only.
learningPath: Read the overview and core concepts for Lua Scripting in CE
Study official documentation and recommended articles
